data.description:
C5 of the application-form refactor: replace magic/bare status symbols in the form lifecycle with the enum scopes already provided by the Strata base classes. Behavior-preserving. Follow-up PR after C1 (`drip-blend-briar`); depends on it, because C1 consolidates the affected queries (`has_pending_form`, `flow_status`) into the new `CertificationCaseApplicationForm` base.

Full plan (vault): `Tech Specs/OSCER/application-form-lifecycle-refactor-plan.md`

## Origin
Surfaced by the 2026-06-29 refactor scan; scoped as the C5 follow-up in the 2026-06-30 design session. Bare status symbols shadow enums that already exist:
- `where(status: :in_progress)` / `status: :submitted` shadow the `Strata::ApplicationForm` status enum.
- `status: :completed` / `status: [:on_hold, :pending]` shadow the `Strata::Task` enum; `[:on_hold, :pending]` is literally "not completed", and `Strata::Task` already ships `scope :completed` / `scope :incomplete`.

## Scope (form models only)
- Replace the bare-symbol status queries in the consolidated lifecycle with the existing enums/scopes: form `.in_progress`, `<review_task_class>.completed`, and `[:on_hold, :pending]` -> `<review_task_class>.incomplete`.
- Post-C1 these queries live in `CertificationCaseApplicationForm`; edit them there (plus any residual bare-symbol queries left on the leaf models).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Bare-symbol status queries in the form lifecycle replaced with enum/scope equivalents (`.in_progress`, `<review_task>.completed`, `[:on_hold, :pending]` -> `.incomplete`).
- [ ] No new magic status symbols introduced; queries use enums/scopes from `Strata::ApplicationForm` / `Strata::Task`.
- [ ] Behavior unchanged: the three existing `spec/models/*application_form_spec.rb` and the C1 base spec pass unchanged (or updated only to assert scope usage).
- [ ] RuboCop clean; coverage stays >= 92% line / 70% branch.

## Out of scope (separate later pass)
- The 7 hard-coded `"approved"/"denied"` approval-status strings in `certification_case.rb` (61,83,105,127,145,166,194). Tighter blast radius; track separately when picked up.

## Depends on
- C1: `drip-blend-briar` (the base class that owns the consolidated queries).

## References
- Plan: `Tech Specs/OSCER/application-form-lifecycle-refactor-plan.md`
- Models: `app/models/{activity_report,exemption,denial_response}_application_form.rb`, and (post-C1) `app/models/certification_case_application_form.rb`
data.title: Replace bare status symbols with enum scopes in the application-form lifecycle (C5)
